metadata.description: Paraphrase evaluation cases for anti-overfit validation. Same wiki ground truth as eval_cases.json but different wording, including Hebrew and mixed-language prompts.

cases.user_request: List the prerequisite courses I need before taking Theory of Computation (02360343).

correct_answer.summary: Theory of Computation requires Intro to Set Theory and Automata for CS (02340129) and Algorithms 1 (02340247).
key_facts: Prerequisite 1: 02340129 — מבוא לתורת הקבוצות ואוטומטים למדמ"ח (Intro to Set Theory and Automata for CS)

cases.evaluation_notes: Paraphrase of prerequisite listing; must not answer personal eligibility only.

cases.user_request: בקורס הסתברות מ (00940412) — באילו מסלולי לימוד הוא מוגדר כקורס חובה?

correct_answer.summary: Probability M (00940412) is required in 9 BSc tracks.
key_facts: Track 2: track-computer-science-data-ml (CS — Data Analysis & ML concentration)
Course is filed under faculty-dds but also required by CS and Education tracks

cases.evaluation_notes: Hebrew paraphrase of reverse track lookup; all 9 tracks required.

cases.user_request: Where is Advanced Probability (00940412) mandatory across Technion study tracks?

correct_answer.summary: Course 00940412 is formally required in 9 undergraduate tracks.

cases.evaluation_notes: Shorter paraphrase; subset of tracks still requires total count 9.

cases.user_request: I'm on the 4-year General CS track (track code 023023). How many credits do I need to graduate, and what's the category breakdown?

correct_answer.summary: The 4-year General CS track requires 155 credits: 87 required, 56 faculty electives, 12 Technion-wide.

cases.evaluation_notes: Track code must not be treated as a course number.

cases.user_request: Moed A was 72 and Moed B was 58. Under Technion rules, what is my official final grade for the course?

correct_answer.summary: Official final grade is 58 (last grade rule).
key_facts: The determining grade is always the last grade taken (Moed A or Moed B)
The rule applies even when the later grade is lower than the earlier one
58 is a passing grade (passing threshold is 55)
Both Moed A and Moed B grades count in cumulative GPA calculations (not just one)

cases.evaluation_notes: Short Moed paraphrase; must not say 72 is the final grade.

cases.user_request: תן לי את הרשימה המלאה של כל התנאים שמכניסים סטודנט תואר ראשון למצב אקדמי לא תקין בטכניון.

correct_answer.summary: Any one of 8 OR-conditions triggers non-regular academic standing.
key_facts: Any single condition is sufficient — all 8 are OR-conditions
Condition 1: Weighted cumulative GPA is below 65
Condition 2: Course success rate is below 66%
Condition 3: Was in non-regular standing the previous semester and did not fulfill the prescribed study plan
Condition 4: Did not complete the Physics placement exam by the required date (Part A before semester 3, Part B before semester 4)
Condition 5: Did not complete English language studies by the end of the 4th semester
Condition 6: Did not complete Hebrew language studies by the end of the 2nd semester
Condition 7: Is studying 2 or more years beyond the standard degree duration (from semester 13 onward for 4-year tracks; semester 11 for 3-year tracks)
Condition 8: Accumulated fewer than 27 credits from the recommended study plan in the first two semesters combined

cases.evaluation_notes: Hebrew complete-list paraphrase; all 8 conditions required.

cases.user_request: Can I take Theory of Computation (02360343) next semester with my current transcript?

correct_answer.summary: With an empty completed-course record, the student is not eligible for Theory of Computation until prerequisites are completed.
key_facts: Must not say the student is eligible

cases.evaluation_notes: Personal eligibility with empty transcript; prerequisites must be grounded in wiki catalog and completed-course state.

cases.user_request: For course 02360343, what earlier courses are required, and which degree tracks count it as mandatory?

correct_answer.summary: Two prerequisites and 11 requiring tracks for Theory of Computation.
key_facts: Prerequisite 1: 02340129 — מבוא לתורת הקבוצות ואוטומטים למדמ"ח (Intro to Set Theory and Automata for CS)

cases.evaluation_notes: Compound catalog paraphrase; must include both prerequisite list and track count.
